title: ctenitis ferruginea
intro: Ctenitis ferruginea, also known as the rusty ctenitis fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis ferruginea include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, Ctenitis ferruginea is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
